## DistPath interface

Set the directory of the dist files.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface DistPath extends DistPathConfig 
```
**Extends:** DistPathConfig

## Remarks

More options can be found at [Rsbuild - distPath](https://rsbuild.dev/config/output/dist-path)<!-- -->.
